summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and deep strength in SQL, relational database design, ETL/ELT pipelines, data validation, and production data reliability. Experienced building and supporting large-scale data platforms for financial services environments, including Oracle-based warehouse/reporting systems, historical retention schemas, source-to-target validation, reconciliation, technical documentation, and performance-oriented query design. Strong Python, Linux/Unix scripting, Git, data quality, and stakeholder-facing delivery background, with transferable experience for PostgreSQL/Greenplum MPP warehouse environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with repeatable, documented data processes.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and historical retention structures to support long-running analytics, trend analysis, forecasting, and executive reporting across banking infrastructure.
Built validation and reconciliation logic for production data pipelines, improving confidence in reporting outputs used for capacity planning, risk analysis, and operational decision-making.

Developed SQL-heavy reporting layers and performance-focused queries across large structured datasets, applying partitioning, indexing, and data modeling concepts to improve maintainability and query efficiency.
Automated data quality checks, exception reporting, and operational dashboards to identify missing, inconsistent, or delayed telemetry before downstream reporting impact.
Created technical documentation, runbooks, process notes, and stakeholder-facing explanations for data flows, pipeline logic, refresh cycles, and production support procedures.

Partnered with infrastructure, analytics, and leadership teams to investigate data issues, perform root-cause analysis, and deliver trusted recurring datasets for monthly and quarterly business reporting.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data used to analyze high-volume web performance, business-impacting latency patterns, and operational health trends.
Led the FAST analytics initiative, mining user-performance datasets and transforming raw telemetry into actionable findings adopted by engineering teams.
Integrated load testing, APM, and reporting data to correlate application behavior with infrastructure performance during production-readiness and release validation activities.
Produced clear dashboarding and technical documentation to support engineering stakeholders, root-cause analysis, and performance optimization decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported large enterprise monitoring environments with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, emphasizing data correctness, reporting consistency, and operational visibility.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts that automated recurring performance reporting and reduced manual export effort for weekly operational reviews.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerts, and technical documentation used by application, operations, and performance teams to evaluate service health and troubleshoot issues.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic and database teams to investigate bottlenecks, validate data patterns, and communicate root-cause findings to technical and non-technical stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting transaction volumes described internally as exceeding VISA-scale load.
Built validation and migration test tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to compare millions of source and target records and support phased production cutover.
Optimized SQL, schema design, and transaction-processing paths to reduce physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query behavior.
Automated schema conversion and reconciliation processes, documenting migration logic and data integrity checks for engineering and operational stakeholders.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability billing and reporting interfaces using C/C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, SQL scripts, Korn Shell, and Oracle in Unix environments.

Improved billing process performance through SQL and PL/SQL optimization, reducing memory usage by 75%, improving throughput by 20%, and achieving 10x database performance improvement through sequence optimization.
Maintained data integration processes across invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows, with emphasis on data correctness, issue triage, and production stability.
Operated across HPUX, SunOS, and Linux environments while using version control, test coordination, and detailed technical documentation for delivery and support.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Platform
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark data platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into trusted forecasting datasets, with validation checks, historical retention, and dashboard-ready outputs for capacity and risk analysis.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift patterns to ingest, transform, and query analytics datasets with attention to file formats, performance, and repeatable ETL design.

projects.name: Sabre Database Migration Validation Framework
projects.description: Built data validation and migration testing utilities to compare source and target records during a high-volume MySQL-to-Oracle RAC migration, supporting reconciliation and phased cutover readiness.
